Load a tested example, edit the complete RDF Message, and preview its QUDT conversion—including UCUM units embedded in CDT typed literals.

RDF Message workbench

Editable input RDF Ctrl/⌘ + Enter
Inferred output RDF

The browser preview recognizes the supported nested QUDT quantity and all CDT UCUM quantity-value datatype input profiles.

Parsed source

→

Canonical value

(value + offset) × multiplier
→

Normalized result

QUDT affine conversion

Under the hood

Conversion metadata

This dependency-free browser preview mirrors the affine calculation. The Node test suite runs the RDF fixtures through Eyeling; CDT lexical parsing and UCUM-to-QUDT matching happen in N3 rules there.

Input profile
Dimension
Source unit
Source multiplier / offset
Target unit
Target multiplier / offset
Expected fixture value
